summary: The batch of synthetic samples demonstrates a comprehensive coverage of the attribute schema, with all modes represented. However, there are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented styles that could be diversified.
recommendations: Encourage more diverse emotional expressions in the complaint and refund_request intents.
Introduce more edge cases and rare scenarios to enhance the variety of situations presented.
Reduce the frequency of similar phrasing by varying sentence structures and vocabulary.
